MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jul-20-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:

Vahe Shakhgeldyan, Esq., BELORYAN & MANUKYAN LLP, (818) 387-6428, for Plaintiff.

FELTON T. NEWELL, Esq., SANDERS ROBERTS LLP, (213) 426-5000, for Defendant.

RE: Defendant CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT.

Not argued/contested. The court and counsel discuss the tentative ruling. The court advises that once the opposition has been filed, the parties can re-file the motion. At conclusion of discussion, the court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Defendant's Motion for summary judgment ordered off calendar for the moving party's noncompliance with Local Rule 2.7(B) (courtesy copies); with compliance, the motion may be re-set for hearing.
